scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm --workspace apps/api run build
scripts.build:web: npm run clean:web && npx prisma generate --schema packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.vercel:build: npm run clean:web && npx prisma generate --schema packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && cd apps/web && npm run build
